name: source-of-truth-creator
description: Claude skill & templates for creating epistemically honest Source of Truth documents. Prevents 6 failure modes: unqualified headers, unmarked estimates, self-assessment bias, absence-as-proof claims, illustrative-as-data, staleness. Companion to Clarity Gate.
